helpful: The complete petition and brief in opposition made the vehicle defects assessable.
The statpack supplied fee-class, relist, CVSG, and Term-specific calibration.
CourtListener search tested whether the asserted conflict was readily visible in pre-disposition case law.
gaps: The corpus query interface has no general keyword or semantic filter for retrieving issue-similar priors.
One CourtListener opinion result resolved to mismatched document text, and a follow-up lookup was throttled.
notes: Provisioned materials and base rates were sufficient. The unusable and throttled CourtListener lookups were excluded from the substantive forecast.
